name: neuro-matrix
description: Anti-neuroslop harness for Claude Code: runtime invariants, hooks, four review agents, a dual approval+verification gate, and a held-out eval harness that keep AI-assisted coding anchored to reality.

plugins.name: neuro-matrix
plugins.description: AI + developer co-system protocol for Claude Code — hypothesis-only claims, randomized invariant self-check, halt-on-no-progress, dual approval+verification gate, and critic / epistemic-auditor sub-agents. Keeps AI-assisted coding and code review anchored to reality.
